behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names padString.cpp, PaddedPODArray<UInt8>, insertFromItself, validateFunctionArguments, FunctionArgumentDescriptors, 1'000'000, num_chars == 0, ILLEGAL_TYPE_OF_ARGUMENT, NUMBER_OF_ARGUMENTS_DOESNT_MATCH, executeImpl — all checked literals are named.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction dictates exact identifiers: 'Use PaddedPODArray<UInt8>', 'use insertFromItself()', 'Use C++14 digit separator 1'000'000', 'Use validateFunctionArguments()', 'Define FunctionArgumentDescriptors', 'Remove unused error codes ILLEGAL_TYPE_OF_ARGUMENT and NUMBER_OF_ARGUMENTS_DOESNT_MATCH' — this is the fix specification.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on specific implementation strings like 'PaddedPODArray<UInt8> pad_string', 'insertFromItself', 'if (num_chars == 0)', 'validateFunctionArguments', 'FunctionArgumentDescriptors', '1'000'000' — alternative correct fixes (e.g., String with reserved trailing bytes, or explicit overflow buffer) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All tests are regex/substring checks on padString.cpp source (e.g., assert 'PaddedPODArray<UInt8> pad_string' in padding_chars_class); the single clang invocation uses -fsyntax-only with missing includes and suppresses errors, not actually verifying behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test requires a specific source-code change to pass; a stub wouldn't satisfy the substring checks.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover each enumerated requirement in instruction.md (PaddedPODArray, insertFromItself, no reinterpret_cast, empty pad in executeImpl, num_chars == 0, digit separator, validateFunctionArguments, error code cleanup).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names, docstrings, and are grouped with FAIL-TO-PASS / PASS-TO-PASS section headers.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a C++ code fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers match between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the exact file src/Functions/padString.cpp and prescribes exact replacement tokens (PaddedPODArray<UInt8>, insertFromItself, 1'000'000, validateFunctionArguments), removing localization and design decisions from the agent.
